source: NvChad - Install NvChad: the requirements and backing up / removing an old Neovim config

questions.q: What minimum Neovim version does this page require for NvChad?
The Nerd Font you set in your terminal emulator must...
questions.why: Use e.g. 'Iosevka Nerd Font', not 'Iosevka Nerd Font Mono'.

questions.q: Besides a Nerd Font and Neovim, which build tools are required?
questions.why: GCC and Make are needed to build components.

questions.q: Which three folders does Neovim create for your files?
questions.why: Those three folders hold config, data and cache respectively.

questions.q: Before a clean install you should first...
options: back up the existing config folders, then delete them
questions.why: Copy the three folders to a backup, then rm -rf them for a clean slate.
Ripgrep is optional but enables Telescope grep.
